name_cn:
Genuine Leather
NEW IN
Large Goya Silk Calfskin Handbag
7 Colors
Model 5608
Dimensions 22.5-16.5-6.5
The Goya is a structured bag that is very well organized for its size. The clean Anagram closure and vibrant colors contrast sharply with its sharp graphic minimalism. It is handcrafted from exquisite silk calfskin with a soft Nappa sheepskin lining. It embodies exquisite craftsmanship and is a new LOEWE product worth adding to your collection.
Shoulder carry
Adjustable shoulder strap
Magnetic closure
Four interior pockets, including a zip pocket and a snap pocket
One exterior pocket
Calfskin lining
Metal-embossed LOEWE logo on the strap
